infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ePRX UV1 needs location access to track your missions and display them on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: ePRX UV1 tracks your mission progress even when the device is locked.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow ePRX UV1 to access your photos to upload documentation.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow ePRX UV1 to use your camera to capture data.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow ePRX UV1 to access your photos to upload documentation.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow ePRX UV1 to use your camera to capture data.

plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow ePRX UV1 to access your location even when the app is in the background.
